export default "## **Welcome to the study**\n\nThank you for taking part! If you've already completed the consent form and\nbaseline questionnaire from the invitation email, you're all set to begin —\nyou don't need to do anything else outside this app.\n\n**This study is best completed on a laptop or desktop computer with a\nfull-size screen.** The task material and specification editor are laid out side\nby side and are hard to use on a phone or tablet.\n\n### What happens next\n\n1. A short introduction to Gherkin / BDD notation with examples\n2. Specification-writing guidelines\n3. Four writing tasks — for each of the two assigned problems you will write one Gherkin scenario and one natural-language specification for an LLM to solve it\n\nAfter you finish all four tasks, I'll follow up separately with a short\npost-study survey by email.\n\nIf you have any questions at any point, feel free to contact me at\n[michal.okrasa@unine.ch](mailto:michal.okrasa@unine.ch).\n"
